title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
